rất tuyệt vời, cả nhà mình rất thích địa điểm này. Đêm ở trên tàu rất chill, phù hợp đi với nhóm bạn vfa cả gia đình.Service khu này tạm ổn, mình thấy bên Thái các khu cần bảo tồn như này giá thường rất đắt, bạn bè nước ngoài của mình rất thích Hạ Long
HALONG BAY CRUISE HUNTERS agent tripadvisor helped great cruise and tours for me and my friends. Thank you for great trip and we definitely recommend.

We had a wonderful trip with Chris (Huan Tran). From Kate X Up Travel.Chris was very professional and had a vast amount of interesting knowledge. He was very friendly and his  English was amazing. It was a boat trip to see the incredible rock formations appearing from the seaWe had a typical Vietnamese  lunch cooked on board which was delicious.we had prawns, clams,chicken, spring rolls, rice and fruit.A truly memorable experience thanks to Chris for sharing his culture with us. Vivienne and Glyn
A must-see. I went on a day cruise, but there are overnight options as well. The cruise was lovely, the food and guides wonderful. The scenery and history amazing.
We booked a great trip from Halong bay cruise HUNTERS agent on tripadvisor and had wonderdul time during 2 days tour. The weather not so bad and joined almost amazing activities as promised

Halong Bay is one of the most beautiful places that I've ever seen. The water is a beautiful blue and the upcroppings make the scenery even prettier. Our group was on a boat that took us from the port to a cave located in an upcropping. The entire ride was beautiful. We spent about 5 hours on the water and we enjoyed ever minute of it.

We had a 4-hour crew tour that was a 45 minute boat ride, 1 hour kayak and time to visit the thian cung cave.  It was awesome, even though the weather was rather overcast and dreary. The kayaking was great - you had 2-person craft (you have to be very agile to get in an out on the dock), and you could go where you wanted - lots of great scenery and pictures.  The cave was easy walking with cement paths, but lots of stairs.  At the end were some vendors selling food and souvenirs - no hard sell.  I did not find that many tourists and it was a great day.
The cruise we booked included transfer, all meals, kayaking tour, walking cave, hiking up island. It was cold and we could not swim but kayaking is so amazing.

Our first impressions of Halong Bay and the thousands of lime stone islands that are in this area were that of awe and disbelief that it is earthly. It’s truly different and in such a beautiful area with a bay like no other that we’ve seen anywhere else in the world. We had a lovely and sunny day which was great for exploring around here in a tour boat. We stopped at a couple of islands and also hiked through a pretty amazing cave. The second impressions we had were that this area is incredibly popular so it was very crowded. There were hundreds of tour boats on the water at the same time, the island stops were so busy, and on the other side of the water were many commercial boats coming and going all day and into the evening. It’s a busy port area but worth a visit.
HALONG BAY CRUISE HUNTERS tripadvisor agent was excellent. We had an excellent 2d1n trip with them. All inclusive package and kayaking, transfer, meals, island, beach tours included
私たちはハロン湾のエメラルドグリーンの海と石灰岩の島々に感動しました。クルーズ船での夕食は最高で、特に夕日が沈む瞬間は忘れられません。カップルにぴったりの場所です！

Every the day trip is very good.  All boats to the same places (Ti Top Island and the Sung Sot "Surprise Cave").  There is a centralised place for kayaking, bamboo boating, but the 10 min speed boat tours are the best.  3 hours from Hanoi each way.

its an exceptional bay to be visited for sure and not to be missed. the bay is classified as unesco protected .. and deserve to be explored. beautiful and beautiful.. nothing else to say... just relax and watch the beauty of nature. i highly recommend
壮大な石灰岩の島々は確かに印象的ですが、期待していたほどの感動はありませんでした。観光客が多く、少し騒がしい場面もありました。それでも、穏やかな海を眺めながらのクルーズは楽しかったです。写真を撮るには良い場所ですが、静けさを求めるなら別のスポットを探した方が良いかもしれません。全体的には悪くない体験でした。

Wonderful trip to Halong bay. It really is a must-do when visiting Vietnam. The scenery is just staggeringly. We did a one night cruise with Peony Cruise. Very well run, lovely ship, amazing staff. Special mention to Ken, the main host, and in the restaurant the wonderful, very efficient Jason who went out of his way to make sure we were happy. Our cabin was very nice and very comfortable, with a balcony. Food was just delicious, way too much but so difficult to refuse!

Ziel einer Panoramafahrt war die Halong Bucht.es ist ein einmaliges erlebnis den angelegten Rundweg entlang zu schlender mit fantastischer aussicht auf die Bucht.Die Fotomotive gehören zu den unvergesslichen Momenten dieser Reise
Wonderful bay and enchanting landscapes, shame about the weather... with the cloudy sky and the rain it doesn't perform as well as with the sun. Experience worth having, choose the cruise well..
下龙湾简直美到窒息！我们选的豪华游轮太棒了，服务一级棒，房间也超舒服。在甲板上看风景，感觉整个世界都安静下来了。海水清澈，山峰奇特，太适合情侣来放松了。虽然有点小贵，但绝对值得！下次要多住几天！
우리 둘이 하롱베이에 왔는데, 정말 평화로워요! 😌 신비로운 동굴들도 너무 멋있고, 조용한 분위기가 맘에 쏙 들어요! 🏞️ 배 위에서 쉬면서, 아름다운 풍경을 감상하니, 너무 행복해요! 🥰 꼭 다시 오고 싶어요!

Ha Long Bay is absolutely breathtaking—a true natural wonder! The emerald waters and towering limestone karsts create a magical atmosphere that feels like stepping into another world. Yes, it was a bit crowded, but the beauty of the scenery more than made up for it.We did a one-day tour booked through a tour operator in Hanoi’s Old Quarter, and it was a fantastic experience. Cruising through the bay, exploring caves, and soaking in the stunning views was something I’ll always cherish. If you're in Vietnam, Ha Long Bay is an absolute must-visit!

Based on the breathtaking photos and glowing recommendations from my friends, I decided to book a tour to Halong Bay, initially expecting it to be just another popular travel destination. But let me tell you—this place is nothing short of extraordinary.The moment you set eyes on Halong Bay, you realize it’s truly one of a kind. The sheer beauty and vastness of this natural wonder leave you in awe. It’s not just a destination; it’s an experience that lingers in your memory long after you’ve left. Every corner of the bay feels like a masterpiece, with its towering limestone karsts, emerald waters, and the serenity that surrounds you.This wasn’t just a highlight of my trip—it became the pinnacle of my travels. Nothing else quite compares to the magic of cruising through the bay, watching the sunlight dance on the water, or marveling at the grandeur of nature in its purest form.Halong Bay is more than just beautiful; it’s a humbling reminder of how incredible our world can be. If you’re planning a trip, this is the one place you absolutely must experience.
Ανεπανάληπτη εμπειρία, ένα μοναδικό, μαγευτικό αξιοθέατο-θαύμα της φύσης που αν δεν επισκεφθεί κάποιος είναι σαν να μην πήγε στο Βιετνάμ…

We experienced Halong Bay, and wow, the sunsets were truly spectacular! The whole place felt so tranquil, especially as the sun dipped below the horizon. It was a really peaceful experience, just us and the stunning scenery. The boat trip was nice, but those sunsets were the highlight. Definitely a romantic spot for couples.
私たち夫婦で訪れたハロン湾は、まるで水墨画の世界に迷い込んだかのよう！笑 無数の奇岩が海から突き出す景色は、マジでインスタ映えがヤバかった〜！カヤックで洞窟探検したり、エメラルド色の海でまったりしたり、超リラックスできた！石灰岩の形成って、自然ってすごくね？特に夕暮れ時の景色は息をのむほど美しくて、思わず「来て良かった〜！」って叫んじゃった。ベトナム観光のマストな場所だよ、マジで！

This UNESCO World Heritage Site is something else. The scenery is breathtaking! We learned about its rich and ancient history, which made it even more magical. Kayaking through the towering limestone karsts was surreal. It felt like we were in a dream. Seriously, put this on your list. We're still speechless. (And maybe a little seasick, haha!)
这个地方依附于北部湾，景色确实迷人，岩石和海水交相辉映。然而，游客实在太多，影响了我们的体验。虽然拍了很多照片，但我们希望能有更多宁静的时刻。总体来说，还是值得一游，但不必过于期待。
作为一对情侣，我们来到了下龙湾，这里被联合国教科文组织列为世界遗产。风景确实壮观，岩石和海湾让人惊叹。不过，游客很多，感觉有些拥挤。我们享受了探索洞穴和小湾的乐趣，但有些地方的商业化让人失望。总的来说，这里是一个值得一游的地方，但期待宁静的旅行者可能会失望。

Halong Bay's majestic views were captivating, with magnificent limestone islands dotting the horizon. While the scenery was stunning, we found the tourist crowds a bit overwhelming. Still, it was nice to drift through the waters, taking in the sights. A lovely outing for couples, but expect some hustle and bustle!

The pristine waters and towering limestone cliffs created an extraordinary area that took our breath away. We enjoyed a leisurely boat ride, soaking in the views and each other’s company. Just a tip: don’t forget your camera; every angle is picture-perfect!

The towering limestone cliffs and emerald waters were breathtaking, but the crowds dampened the experience a bit. We appreciated the prehistoric human presence in the caves, adding a layer of history to the natural beauty. Overall, it was a nice getaway, but we wished for a quieter moment to fully absorb the magic of this iconic destination.
Die Landschaft ist wirklich toll, unser Schiff war schön und die Reise inklusive der Transfers war sehr gut organisiert.

Our overnight cruise through Ha Long Bay exceeded all expectations! We couldn't stop taking photos of the limestone karsts emerging from emerald waters. The sunset from our cabin's balcony was incredibly romantic. Despite the tourist crowds, we managed to find plenty of intimate moments kayaking between the islands.

There are many ways to go to Ha Long BayI get car sick always🤢 and after many research 🧐 we decided to choose Quang Ninh airport as the way to get to Ha Long Bay. This is very new international airport Small - clean - beautiful .From QN airport go to HL city around 45 mins - 1 hour by taxi : 500-700k ( i booked taxi through website) - if there is someone also book same time you can split the bill with them but this time only us - and i feel better - more comfortable For me Ha Long Bay is such a beautiful place 🤩 How wonderful it is that creator of nature has giving us so much treasures Here, i feel my intuition getting closer to mother earth, grounding and healing. If you are looking for a city with fresh air, close to a nature HL Bay also is a good optionBut if you are looking for a fun city , i would  not rcm HL Bay cause1st in a center food / restaurant there are not so much choices and remember to always check a price b4 you odering2nd  not much activities - bar - club - draft beer. I love this trip, my mind was clear after many triggers inside of me. Grateful for mother earth n family spiritual

The serene environment enveloped us as we cruised through the emerald waters, surrounded by towering limestone karsts. Each moment felt like a postcard! We enjoyed various activities and tours, from kayaking in hidden lagoons to exploring enchanting caves. Watching the sunset over the bay was the highlight of our adventure, painting the sky in stunning colors.

We explored hidden caves and secluded beaches, sharing whispers and laughter as we took in the stunning views. The highlight was a sunset dinner on the deck, where the sky painted itself in hues of orange and pink. This trip was a perfect blend of adventure and romance, leaving us with unforgettable memories and a longing to return to this paradise.

Our trip to Halong Bay was a dream come true! As we cruised through the stunning emerald waters, surrounded by majestic limestone islands, we felt like we were in a postcard. Kayaking through hidden caves and enjoying fresh seafood on deck made it even more special. This is a romantic getaway we’ll always treasure!

観光地として有名なハロン湾に現地で予約してサンセットクルーズに参加しました。船内ビュッフェ、奇岩を眺めたり鍾乳洞を探索したり島に上陸したりと意外と色々な内容で楽しめました！船の屋上でパーティーをしながら(ミニカラオケ大会みたいなのもあった)夕陽も見ることができてとても良かったです。陸のハロン湾と呼ばれているチャンアンにも行きましたが、景観は似ているができることの内容が違うので両方行くも良し、どちらか片方に行くも良しな感じです。

The bay is very nice and has a wonderful atmosphere. However the tourist industry and extraction industry are exploiting the bay already at maximum rate. So, while this bay is wonderful tody, I fear that in 5 years time, things will have chnged to worse.
This was an awesome cruise. Stunning views. Activities: kayaking, swimming in the bay, fishing, visiting caves. Very nice place. A must do

I've lived in Vietnam for almost two years and I kinda regret not coming here sooner. The views are absolutely stunning and breathtaking. I highly recommend this amazing town and taking a cruise to see all the islands and inlets. You won't regret it!
我们一群朋友在下龙湾度过了令人难以置信的三天。乘坐游船穿梭在数千个石灰岩岛屿之间，感觉仿佛置身于仙境。我们在船上享用了新鲜的海鲜，在天井洞和惊讶洞探险，还尝试了皮划艇。黄昏时分的景色尤其壮观，夕阳映照在海面上，美得让人窒息。绝对是此生难忘的体验！

Beim Kajaking haben wir uns mindestens dreimal verfahren, aber hey, jeder Felsen sieht nun mal gleich aus! Die Übernachtung auf dem Boot war romantisch, auch wenn das Schnarchen vom Nachbarkabine klang wie ein verschnupfter Drache. Trotz schwitziger Momente und leicht chaotischer Organisation - ein absolut magisches Erlebnis!
Nhà hàng sang trọng,đồ ăn ngon,view biển đẹp,nhân viên phục vụ tốt,rất phù hợp cho ai thích đi du lịch,mình cảm thấy địa điểm này rất Ok .
increíble lugar para explorar, vale mucho la pena viajar al sudeste asiático, sin duda Vietnam y Camboya son destinos impresionantes

Halong Bay was like sailing into a fairytale!  Everywhere we looked, towering limestone islands rose from the emerald water, creating a scene straight out of a movie.  We spent our days kayaking through hidden lagoons, exploring caves, and soaking up the sunshine on deck.  Every sunset over those mystical waters was more breathtaking than the last.  Halong Bay is simply a must-see!

Une expérience unique ! En venant de France, c'est le dépaysement garanti et les yeux qui brillent à coup sûr ! Le combo gagnant : Les trois bay d'halong : Maritimes, terrestres et montagneuses.On recommande !

3 hr. long cruise on modernized version of a "junk" or you can book an overnight journey on one of the very large modern cruise type vessels.  Although the bay can get crowded with tourist boats, all go very slowly. Plenty to see and enjoy these geologic marvels.
我们最近体验了一次难忘的下龙湾之旅，搭乘奢华游轮穿梭于壮丽的石灰岩岛屿之间。每一座岛屿都如同大自然的雕塑，令人叹为观止。游轮上的设施一流，服务周到，让我们在欣赏美景的同时享受舒适与宁静。夜晚，我们在甲板上观星，感受着海风的轻抚。这次旅行不仅增进了我们的感情，也让我们领略了越南的自然奇观。

In June 2024, my family and I had the amazing chance to visit Bright Cave in Ha Long Bay. The experience was nothing short of stunning. The cave's natural beauty was truly impressive, with its remarkable rock formations and sparkling stalactites. We were enthralled by the peaceful and immaculate environment, which offered a perfect escape from the busy pace of daily life. The tour was well-organized and informative, allowing us to fully appreciate the cave's wonders. Our guide was knowledgeable and enriched our experience with fascinating facts and stories. Visiting Bright Cave was a highlight of our trip, and we highly recommend it to anyone seeking a unique and unforgettable adventure in Ha Long Bay.
我们租了条小船，船夫看起来比我们还兴奋。他一边划船一边唱歌，唱得比鸭子叫还难听，我们笑得差点掉进水里。途中，我们看到一个奇形怪状的岩石，有人说像猴子屁股，结果我们争论了半天到底是猴屁股还是大象鼻子。最后，我们在一个小岛上野餐，结果被一群不速之客——调皮的猴子抢走了食物。这趟旅行绝对是笑料百出，回味无穷！

Hè nào nhà mình cũng đến Hạ Long du lịch vì rất thuận tiện đi lại, từ Hà Nội chỉ mất khoảng 2:30h đi đường là đã đến HLĐồ ăn ngon, rẻ ,con người hà long rất thân thiện, có nhiều khu vui chơi kết hợp với bãi biển đẹp

Vịnh Hạ Long là một trong những kỳ quan thiên nhiên nổi tiếng nhất của Việt Nam, được UNESCO công nhận là Di sản Thế giới. Với hơn 1.600 đảo đá vôi và hòn đảo nhỏ nằm rải rác trên vùng biển xanh biếc, vịnh tạo nên cảnh quan hùng vĩ và độc đáo. Các đảo có hình thù kỳ lạ, xen lẫn các hang động như Động Thiên Cung, Hang Sửng Sốt, và Hang Đầu Gỗ, là điểm thu hút không thể bỏ qua cho du khách yêu thích thiên nhiên và khám phá.Đi thuyền qua vịnh là cách tuyệt vời nhất để chiêm ngưỡng toàn cảnh, với nhiều tour du thuyền đưa du khách tham quan các đảo, làng chài nổi, và thưởng thức các hoạt động như chèo thuyền kayak, lặn ngắm san hô.Hạ Long không chỉ đẹp bởi phong cảnh thiên nhiên hùng vĩ mà còn mang đậm dấu ấn lịch sử và văn hóa, là điểm đến không thể thiếu khi đến thăm miền Bắc Việt Nam.
和朋友们一起去下龙湾玩简直太开心了！景色真的绝了，山水之间仿佛时间都静止了，我们几个“菠萝头”瞬间被这儿的宁静祥和给征服了，只想躺平做个美男子/美女子！不过讲真，这儿的景色真的太美了，随手一拍都是大片，感觉朋友圈摄影大赛稳赢了！下次有机会还要来这儿度假，感受这份“岁月静好”！

The bay's beauty is unparalleled, with thousands of incredible limestone formations rising from emerald waters. Kayaking through hidden caves and enjoying the sunset over the bay were captivating experiences. A must-see destination in Vietnam.
Halong - charming landscape, the world heritage sites, the nature wonder of the world. Visit Halong by cruise make you fatisfied

我们在下龙湾度过了难忘的时光！这里的景色简直美得让人窒息。作为国家级遗迹和景观，下龙湾的魅力不言而喻。那些耸立在碧绿海水中的石灰岩岛屿，就像是大自然的艺术品。我们乘坐游船穿梭在岛屿之间，感受着这里独特的氛围。难怪下龙湾成为了许多艺术家和文化人的灵感源泉。无论是画家还是诗人，都能在这里找到创作的灵感。晚上，我们坐在甲板上看星星，聊着天，感觉整个世界都安静了下来。如果你来越南，一定不要错过这个地方，它绝对值得一游！

¡Qué pasada la Bahía de Halong! Nos quedamos flipando con el paisaje impresionante. Las formaciones kársticas son una auténtica maravilla, parecen sacadas de una peli de fantasía. Hicimos un crucero y fue lo más relajante del mundo. El agua tranquila, el cielo azul, y esas islas enormes saliendo del mar... una locura. Nos sentimos como si estuviéramos en otro planeta, súper peaceful. Si vais a Vietnam, no os lo podéis perder. Es como estar en un sueño, pero despiertos.
Chúng tôi đã sử dụng flycam để chụp lại khung cảnh tuyệt đẹp này khi đến với Vịnh Hạ Long. Đây quả thực là một địa điểm du lịch tuyệt vời.

Grazie a un tour di due giorni e una notte tra la baia di Ha Long e quella di Lan Ha, ho vissuto un’esperienza indimenticabile a bordo di una crociera. Ogni istante è stato una sorpresa, con vedute mozzafiato che cambiavano con la luce del giorno. È stato entusiasmante osservare l’evoluzione dei colori della baia, dal mattino al pomeriggio, fino alla quiete della notte, interrotta solo occasionalmente dai festeggiamenti a bordo delle diverse barche.Il momento più emozionante è stato l’alba: vedere la baia risvegliarsi con sfumature che andavano dai verdi chiari ai verdi scuri, mentre i raggi del sole filtravano attraverso le isolette carsiche ricche di vegetazione, mi ha lasciato senza parole.Questa esperienza è assolutamente da consigliare a chiunque visiti il Vietnam. È senza dubbio una delle esperienze più affascinanti e coinvolgenti che queste baie hanno da offrire.

The stunning seascape of limestone karsts rising from emerald waters is breathtaking. We opted for one of the luxurious cruises, which offered a perfect blend of comfort and adventure. The delicious cuisine was a highlight, with each meal showcasing the best of Vietnamese flavors. The romantic atmosphere aboard the ship was perfect for our couple's getaway. No hay lugar tan espectacular como la Bahía de Halong. Superó.las expectativas que teníamos. Además, nuestro crucero, de la armadora Indochina, era perfecto y lujoso

This was the last place we visited as part of a 3 week tour of Vietnam, and came with the strongest recommendations from fellow Brits back home.It's relatively easy to get to from Hanoi (3 hrs by bus) and you will need to pick up a cruise ship in the harbour to visit. Our recommendation would be to try to get a 2 night, 3 day cruise as it gives you the opportunity to get off the beaten track for one of your days, and see parts of the Bay less visited by other boats.We're sure you'll have seen pics of the (jaw-dropping) scenery, but if not, its like a cross between a set from Jurassic Park and a creative teenager's Minecraft universe: nearly 2000 small limestone islands rising from the sea, mostly covered in green vegetation. You'll also find beaches, caves and even the odd lagoon, circled by the local seabirds hunting for their lunch. And lots of cruise ships, and sadly the detritus of tourism, as plastic bottles and empty cans of beer float past you amidst the occasional drizzle of diesel.We quizzed our tour guide on the latter, and she assured us that the authorities are making steps to improve this and do regularly clean up the area with the help of taxes. We heard lots of tourists moaning about the plastic and other waste, and we feel most visitors would be happy to pay an explicit surcharge aimed solely at the clean up of the region. If they want it to remain a "Natural Wonder of the World" as is oft claimed by the guides, please try to keep it as such. Feel free to upvote this review if you agree with these sentiments as in a tiny way we might make a difference. Definitely visit the area but treat it responsibly whilst you are there and encourage others to do the same.

The breathtaking scenery of Halong Bay, with its emerald waters and rocky islands, is truly unforgettable. Kayaking through hidden lagoons while watching the sunset is an experience like no other. With a plethora of on and off-board activities, there's never a dull moment. While the food was decent, the overall experience is a must-see!

The stunning scenery of limestone cliffs and emerald waters was like something out of a movie. We loved walking up to beautiful sunrises and ending our days with peaceful sunsets over the bay. It was the perfect romantic getaway for some much-needed relaxation and breathtaking views.

Wow, just wow! Halong Bay completely blew us away.  The scenery is truly spectacular, with towering limestone cliffs, emerald waters, and countless islands to explore.  We loved kayaking through hidden lagoons, watching the sunset over the bay, and just soaking up the magical atmosphere.  It's a must-see in Vietnam!

This was an amazing experience with outstanding views. The room was small but that was understandable when considering the boats overall size. Lots of fun activities offered on and off- board. The food was okay but definitely not very vegetarian friendly. The crew onboard the boat was exceptional. We went to a floating fishing village, a limestone cave and a pearl farm. Overall, it was a great experience that we won't soon forget. Thank you Halong Bay

Meravigliosa esperienza in crociera. La baia è magica. Tramonto stupendo!  Consigliata esperienza in canoa con visita presso l'allevamento di ostriche. Bagno e salita di 400 gradini per panorama mozzafiato. Da non perdere la grotta.  Dovrebbe essere attenzionato du più l'abbandono dei rifiuti

I highly recommend this tour. I went with Tonkin Tours, and Phong was our guide. It is important for people to know that in August it will be hot, and in some parts there is some waiting behind other groups to enter the caves or climb to the view on Titop Island. But if you go with an open mind to that, you’ll love it. Spectacular vistas and the kayaking among the rock formations was incredible. Phong was a fantastic guide with excellent English and the food on the boat was excellent, so much of it and they catered well to vegetarians and vegans. Please make sure to take your own water in a refillable bottle as single use plastic is prohibited in Halong Bay now.

Ha Long Bay, what an awesome and beautiful place. First time I visited and stunned about the landscape here. It is so unique and beautiful. Thien cung cave also so unique and beatiful too.
Kết hợp sự sang trọng, phiêu lưu và khám phá văn hóa. Rất đáng khuyến khích cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm hoàn hảo giữa tiện nghi và khám phá trên biển.

The onboard dining experience was equally impressive, featuring an array of delectable Vietnamese and international dishes that satisfied even the most discerning palate. What truly set this cruise apart, however, was the exceptional service provided by the staff.
The daily excursions were a highlight, combining informative tours with a relaxed atmosphere. Everything was great and nothing to complain!
Throughout the cruise, we were fortunate to have two outstanding directors who went above and beyond to ensure the comfort and satisfaction of all guests. Great!
Thắng cảnh tuyệt vời của Việt Nam. Di sản thiên nhiên thế giới. Hùng vĩ, đẹp, tự nhiên.
Đúng là kì quan thiên nhiên thế giới, rất đẹp rất có hồn hùng vĩ, mang lại nhiều trải nghiệm thú vị
Rất đẹp. Rất đáng để đi. Nhưng dịch vụ hơi đắt
Quá đẹp , Việt Nam có Hạ Long là nơi siêu đẹp , nên đi 1 lần và thêm nữa trong đời vì sẽ không hối tiếc

Teluk Ha Long merupakan salah satu keajaiban alam dunia yang terkenal dengan ribuan pulau kapur menjulang di atas laut berwarna hijau toska. Pemandangannya sangat menakjubkan, terutama saat pagi dan senja. Selain keindahan alamnya, teluk ini juga menawarkan wisata kapal, gua-gua eksotis, dan budaya lokal yang unik, menjadikannya destinasi favorit wisatawan dari seluruh dunia.sangat disarankan untuk berwisata kesini ketika pergi ke Vietnam

This beautiful place is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. It’s a full-day excursion tour with many magnificent caves to explore. The breathtaking scenes are accompanied by various activities to enjoy. It’s a must-visit destination for anyone looking to add a touch of adventure to their bucket list.
非常值得一去的景點 巧奪天工的自然風光 如果天氣好 真係好靚 可以參加一日/兩日遊 由河內市中心出發需要大概2小時30分鐘 因此 如果是參觀一日遊 時間會有點緊張 由於我去的時段是鄰近聖誕節 因為島上面非常多人 overtourism的體現 但景色本身是很美的

Very nice place. A must see when you come to Vietnam. I recommend the minimum 2 nights stay as most of the people only take one night and don’t get to see the most beautiful places. In the first day you only get to see the most crowded places. In the next day we went to a remote location and enjoyed some nice views and activities.

A must do when in Vietnam 🇻🇳 Short trip from Hanoi, about 2hrs 30m. If you book a tour with transit, you will get picked up from your hotel and they have stop over on the way to the terminal. We spent a weekend on the cruise, which was sufficient. There was a welcome drink, buffet lunch, dinner, breakfast, entertainment. You admire beautiful views from your room balcony and get to do trips to the caves, kayaking, swimming. Super enjoyable

Wow! What a place!😍 You must add it to your Vietnam itinerary. The cruise, cave exploration, view & the food, all were amazing! Here you can even enjoy few activities like Kayaking, Bamboo boat & speed boat. …

Ha Long Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage Site located in northern Vietnam, is one of the country's most iconic natural wonders and a must-visit destination for any traveler. I recently had the opportunity to explore this breathtaking bay, and I can confidently say it captivated my heart with its stunning landscapes and rich cultural experiences.  The first thing that strikes you about Ha Long Bay is its remarkable beauty. The bay is dotted with over 1,600 limestone islands and islets, many of which are covered in lush greenery. The sight of these towering karsts rising dramatically from the emerald waters is simply awe-inspiring. Whether viewed from a boat, a kayak, or the shore, the scenery is breathtaking and offers numerous photographic opportunities.  A visit to Ha Long Bay is often best experienced through a cruise. There are various options available, from day trips to overnight excursions on luxury junks. I opted for an overnight cruise, and it was one of the highlights of my trip. The crew was incredibly attentive, and the accommodation was comfortable, creating the perfect ambiance for relaxation. The daily itinerary included visits to hidden caves, swimming in the bay, and enjoying sumptuous meals featuring fresh seafood while watching the sunset over the water.  Apart from cruise activities, Ha Long Bay offers plenty of opportunities for adventure and exploration. Kayaking through the bay’s smaller lagoons and caves was a thrilling experience that allowed me to get closer to the stunning rock formations.
非常漂亮的景點，真的是一定要來看看，連中國人都說比桂林還漂亮，真的是大自然的鬼斧神工，會獨木舟的可以兩倆同行，不然可以搭船夫的船慢慢看景色拍照，河上還會有當地人一起在船上唱歌，非常舒服的一個景點。
下龍灣海上桂林【下龍灣特別升等五星級豪華郵輪 DRAGON CRUISES】 海上桂林 奇景遊【越式下午茶+百匯自助式午餐、鐘乳石洞、TITOP 島+觀景台、鬥雞島】  好可惜天氣陰陰的 但還是很壯觀  在遊艇吃飯 登島可以爬山 也有坐遊艇行程我覺得很棒
Must see in Vietnam- despite it is so turisted. Were on a luxury cruise which was a great experience in it self - but I assume all boats give the same tours and the nature is stunning.
在河內當地旅行社訂購一日遊，搭乘大使郵輪，早上轉搭小船參觀北越下龍灣著名的海上喀斯特地形及壯觀奇特的鐘乳石洞。

エメラルドグリーンの海に浮かぶ無数の奇岩、その美しさに世界中の旅人が魅了される場所、ハロン湾。ベトナム北部のこの地を訪れることは、長年の夢だった。写真や映像で何度も目にしてきたその景観を、この目で確かめたいという思いが募り、ついに旅の計画を立てた。  ハノイからの移動は車で約4時間。道中、ベトナムの田園風景が広がり、のどかな雰囲気に心が和む。車窓から見える水牛や農作業をする人々の姿は、都会の喧騒とは無縁の世界だ。途中で立ち寄った休憩所では、地元の名物であるライチやドラゴンフルーツを味わい、南国の果物の甘さに舌鼓を打った。  ハロン湾に近づくにつれ、遠くに見える奇岩が徐々にその存在感を増していく。港に到着すると、大小さまざまなクルーズ船が並んでおり、その光景だけでも胸が高鳴る。今回選んだのは、一泊二日のクルーズツアー。船上で過ごす時間を存分に楽しむために、部屋の設備や食事内容を事前にリサーチしておいた。  乗船すると、スタッフの温かい歓迎を受け、船内の案内が始まる。客室は木の温もりが感じられる内装で、窓からはハロン湾の絶景が広がっている。荷物を置いてデッキに出ると、爽やかな海風が頬を撫で、遠くに見える奇岩群がまるで絵画のようだ。  クルーズが出発すると、船はゆっくりと湾内を進んでいく。エメラルドグリーンの海面に映る奇岩は、形も大きさも様々で、一つとして同じものはない。その中でも特に目を引くのが「闘鶏岩」。二つの岩が向かい合う姿は、まさに闘う鶏のようで、そのユニークさに思わず写真を撮りたくなる。  最初の立ち寄り先は「スンソット洞窟」。船を降りて階段を上がっていくと、入口からは想像もつかないほど広大な空間が広がっていた。内部はカラフルなライトアップが施され、鍾乳石が幻想的な雰囲気を醸し出している。自然が作り出した芸術に、言葉を失うほど感動した。  洞窟見学の後は、シーカヤック体験。ライフジャケットを着用し、二人乗りのカヤックに乗り込む。自分たちの力で漕ぎ進むことで、奇岩を間近に感じることができる。水面から見上げる岩の迫力は圧巻で、自然の偉大さを肌で感じた。カヤックを漕いでいると、小さな入り江や隠れた洞窟など、船では行けない場所にもアクセスできるのが魅力だ。  夕暮れ時、船に戻るとディナーの時間だ。ベトナム料理を中心とした食事は、シーフードが豊富で新鮮そのもの。特にエビやカニの料理は絶品で、海の恵みを堪能した。食事の後はデッキでゆったりと過ごし、満天の星空を眺めながら静かな時間を楽しむ。遠くで聞こえる波の音が心地よく、日常の喧騒を忘れさせてくれる。  夜にはオプションでイカ釣り体験ができるとのことで、参加してみることにした。スタッフが釣り方を教えてくれ、簡単な道具で挑戦する。暗闇の中、海面をライトで照らしながら待っていると、小さなイカが釣れたときの喜びはひとしおだ。釣れたイカはその場で調理してくれ、新鮮な味わいを楽しむことができた。  翌朝、早起きをして日の出を見にデッキへ向かう。薄明かりの中、徐々に空が明るくなり、太陽が顔を出す瞬間は息を呑む美しさだ。朝の静けさと清々しい空気が相まって、心が洗われるような感覚になる。朝食後は「ティエンクン洞窟」への見学が予定されている。  ティエンクン洞窟は「天宮の洞窟」とも呼ばれ、その名の通り天上界を思わせる美しさだ。内部には巨大な鍾乳石がいくつもあり、その形状は想像力をかき立てる。ガイドさんが指し示す鍾乳石は、龍や亀、恋人たちなど様々な形に見えるという。光と影のコントラストが絶妙で、自然が作り出した奇跡を目の当たりにした。  クルーズの最後は、デッキでのティータイム。穏やかな海を眺めながら、ベトナムの伝統的なお茶を楽しむ。船はゆっくりと港へ戻り、名残惜しさを感じつつも、充実した時間に満足感でいっぱいだ。  ハロン湾での体験を通じて感じたのは、自然の偉大さと人間の営みの小ささだ。長い年月をかけて形成された奇岩や鍾乳洞は、壮大でありながらも繊細な美しさを持っている。また、地元の人々が自然と共生しながら生活している姿にも心を打たれた。  今回の旅で特に印象的だったのは、スタッフやガイドさんの温かいおもてなしだ。言葉の壁はあっても、笑顔や仕草で心が通じ合う瞬間が何度もあった。彼らのプロフェッショナリズムとホスピタリティが、この旅をより一層素晴らしいものにしてくれたと感じている。  ハロン湾を訪れる際のアドバイスとしては、季節選びが重要だと感じた。乾季にあたる時期は天候が安定しており、快適に過ごすことができる。一方、雨季は天候が崩れやすく、クルーズが中止になる場合もあるとのことなので、事前に情報を確認しておくと良いだろう。  また、クルーズの選び方も大切だ。船の設備やコース、アクティビティの内容など、自分の希望に合ったものを選ぶことで、満足度が大きく変わる。予算に応じて様々なクラスのクルーズがあるので、事前にしっかりとリサーチすることをおすすめする。  ハロン湾での体験は、写真や映像では伝えきれない感動があった。エメラルドグリーンの海と奇岩のコントラスト、洞窟内の神秘的な光景、そして地元の人々との触れ合い。すべてが特別な思い出となり、心に深く刻まれた。  ベトナムを訪れる機会があれば、ぜひハロン湾を旅程に加えてみてほしい。その美しさは、一生に一度は見る価値があると断言できる。自然が織りなす壮大な景観と、そこに流れる穏やかな時間が、日常の疲れを癒してくれるだろう。  帰りの道中、車窓から見える風景を眺めながら、今回の旅を振り返った。ハロン湾での体験は、ただの観光ではなく、自分自身を見つめ直すきっかけにもなった気がする。自然の中で過ごす時間は、心を豊かにし、新たな発見をもたらしてくれる。  次回は、季節を変えて再訪してみたいと思う。季節ごとに異なる表情を見せるハロン湾は、何度訪れても新たな感動が待っているに違いない。また、他のエリアも含めて、ベトナムの魅力をもっと深く知りたいという思いが芽生えた。  旅は人生を豊かにする。ハロン湾での経験は、そのことを改めて実感させてくれた。これからも新たな場所を訪れ、多くの出会いや発見を求めて旅を続けていきたい。
世界遺産にもなっている観光名所。 日本語ツアーで行って鍾乳洞見学→手漕ぎ船→島の展望台を観光。 景色良くて楽しめた。

Ha Long Bay, what an awesome and beautiful place. I booked one day trip from Hanoi. But I think I‘ve seen a more crowded place. The number of boats and people on “the beach” and in the cave is too much. With all that being said, I would not miss this place if I was in Vietnam 🇻🇳 They have 2-3 days cruises which will be more appropriate  because early in the day the day cruise people are not there.’

We booked a LaCosta Cruise for a day tour. Our cruise director Duk Tom was very informative, fun and made our trip quite enjoyable. The scenery is stunning. The caves were outstanding and the speedboat tour is a must. To top it off we were able to see the sunset on the water. Note, there were crowds and lots of boats but tour and sightseeing was well managed. Highly recommend a visit.
北越最著名的世界遺產，同時也是世界新七大奇景之一，可說是有生之年必來！不僅有獨一無二的海上喀斯特地形還有美麗壯觀的鐘乳石洞。這次因跟團時間有限，只參訪了驚奇洞、英雄島、鬥雞石、香爐石、007場景等著名地標，仍然覺得不虛此行、印象深刻！很希望下次可以再來看看其他美麗的島嶼和岩洞！
日本人なら日本人専用の日帰りツアーに応募するとよいかも 日本語喋れるベトナム人ガイドが丁寧に案内してれくる。 腹空かせるためかやたら歩かされたけどそれも良い思い出。
天気も良く、綺麗な景色で楽しく過ごせました。JVTAさんのツアーで参加したので日本語ガイドさんがハノイの送迎バスの中からハロン湾、鍾乳洞と色んな話で盛り上げてくれて、参加して良かったです。ツアーだと色々教えてくれるので安心して楽しく過ごせるかも
休暇中に訪れました！ クルーズ中に様々な場所を訪れ、カヌーや登山といったアクティビティを通して、ハロン湾の素晴らしさを知ることができ、船の中でクルーズの中で存分にくつろぎ、他の旅の仲間と会話を楽しむことができました、最高の経験でした！ また行きたいと思います！

I recently visited Ha Long Bay, and it was an unforgettable experience. The sheer beauty of the limestone karsts rising dramatically from the emerald green waters is absolutely mesmerizing. The scenery feels like something out of a dream. I opted for a day cruise, which allowed us to explore the caves, enjoy kayaking, and relax while taking in the serene surroundings. Sung Sot Cave was an incredible highlight with its impressive stalactites and stalagmites.  The boat ride was comfortable, and the staff were friendly and accommodating, making the entire experience even more enjoyable. If you have more time, I highly recommend the overnight cruises, which I plan to do next time.  One small downside was the number of tourists in certain areas, but it didn’t take away from the overall beauty and tranquility of the place. The local food served on the boat was fresh and flavorful, adding an authentic Vietnamese touch to the trip.  If you’re visiting Vietnam, Ha Long Bay is a destination you simply cannot miss. It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site for a reason, and it truly lives up to the hype!

ハロン湾でのクルーズツアーに参加しました。 クルーズ船内での食事や、鍾乳洞、手漕ぎボート、展望台からの景色など日本では味わえない異国情緒漂う時間を満喫できます！ 台風の影響を受けてキャンセルされる方も多いらしいのですが、台風の影響はあまり感じられず、何か制限されるようなことは一切ありませんでした！ 日本人向けツアー二酸化したため、ガイドさんが日本語で解説してくださる上に日本人と固まって行動できるので安心です！

Ha Long Bay is absolutely breathtaking! The limestone karsts rising out of the emerald-green waters create a surreal, otherworldly landscape. Taking a boat cruise through the bay was a highlight, with stunning views at every turn. We also visited hidden caves and floating villages, which added to the experience. The serenity and natural beauty of the area make it a must-visit for anyone traveling to Vietnam. Highly recommend spending at least a day or two to truly soak in the beauty of this UNESCO World Heritage site!

Discovering one of the country’s most iconic and picturesque natural wonders. Just a few hours from Hanoi, you’re greeted by a breathtaking landscape of limestone karsts rising from serene waters. We spent the day drifting through this tranquil paradise, taking in the mesmerizing views.😍✨ Must visit this place for a surreal experience with your friends & family!

Ha Long Bay is indeed one of Vietnam's most iconic and popular tourist destinations, attracting travelers from all around the world. With its stunning view from different cave and emerald waters, it's no wonder it draws such a large crowds. Lots of fun activities like kayaking, walking up the stairs to see sun song cave, Tip top island, beach etc. lots of boat sailing on the ha long bay island.

世界遺産に恥じない行く価値ありの場所です。 3000程の切り立った島々がどこまでも連なる景色は世界の他のどこでも見た事ありませんでした。 食事もしながら、クルーズで島々を観て巡る体験は非常に新鮮でした。  It is definitely worth visiting. There are thousands of islands on the horizon. I have never had such an experience anywhere in the world. You can enjoy cruising while dining on the ship.

Wyjątkowe i warte odwiedzenia miejsce, w skałach znajdują się piękne jaskinie, warto eksplorować zarówno wodę jak i ląd. Można zauważyć łódki sprzątające, niestety momentami jest tam naprawdę brudna i zaśmiecona woda

Tourist attractions- world unesco site- can book over night cruise- day visit is not enough to explore beauty of Ha long bay. Try book 5 star cruise have decent food . They cover all visit plan in ha long bay . Must do …..

This place was simply breathtaking. It was my first overnight cruise experience, and it was totally worth it. The scenes were exceptional wherever you looked, and the amazing company of the Vietnamese people made it even better.

This UNESCO world heritage site is a must visit place in Vietnam. You can take day cruise as well as overnight cruises to visit this area. Atleast 2D1N  cruise is recommended to be able to visit the different spots and enjoy the tour. There are four different routes which cruises usually take. You can choose your route basis spots that you want to visit and crowd that you want to encounter! Do  visit Sang Sot cave and Ti-top island. Also you can connect with cruises directly via email to get better prices.

Splendid. Breathtaking. Marvellous. A true wonder that is not to be missed. I totally recomment the 2 days/ 1 night cruise at least to fully enjoy the setting. Paid 128$ for the cruise everything included except drinks...and you get a lot of food. You get to visit a cave, go to a small island beach and viewpoint. Learn to cook spring rolls. Fish in the sea. And in the morning you will visit a pearl farm and enjoy kayaking in the bay. A mesmerizing experience.

A must visit place in Vietnam. Not very far from Hanoi. Hundreds of small islands, caves and lagoons. Beautiful beaches. The downside is too many tourists and long lines. Carry a water flask as plastic is not allowed here.

Nous avons passé une expérience inoubliable en faisant une croisière dans la baie d’Halong. Dès l’instant où nous avons embarqué, nous avons été émerveillés par la beauté des paysages : les formations rocheuses et les îlots entourés d’eaux calmes étaient à couper le souffle. Nous avons pu profiter de la vue magnifique au coucher du soleil, un moment magique que nous n’oublierons jamais. Le bateau était confortable et moderne, avec de superbes espaces comme la terrasse panoramique pour admirer le paysage, et des zones détente où nous avons pu savourer un cocktail en toute tranquillité. Le service était impeccable et l’équipage très accueillant. Un vrai moment de sérénité et de découverte que je recommande à tous ceux qui souhaitent découvrir la beauté naturelle du Vietnam. Un grand merci pour cette croisière exceptionnelle !

I did the tour twice now. One tour back in 2017 and one tour in 2024. the tour is still breathtaking and you can’t get enough from the view. Make sure to choose a tour that fits your interest since there are almost unlimited options and routes that you can take.  My opinion is that you have to stay at least 2D1N otherwise it’s not worth the long ride.

You cannot come to Vietnam and not go to Ha Long Bay. You’ll have many options of tours ranging from day long excursions to luxurious overnight cruises. We were short on time so we arranged private transport from Ha Noi and  enjoyed a 6 hour tour of the bay, and included multiple activities like kayaking, bamboo boats and speed boating.

Halong Bay, located in the northeastern part of Vietnam, is one of the most famous natural wonders in the world, and for good reason. I was completely mesmerized by the breathtaking scenery as soon as I arrived. The bay is home to thousands of towering limestone islands and islets, scattered across the emerald green waters, creating a truly surreal landscape.  The experience of cruising around Halong Bay was unforgettable. As the boat slowly glided through the calm waters, I could see the towering rock formations rising majestically from the sea, covered with lush greenery. The sight felt almost otherworldly, and it was easy to understand why this place is a UNESCO World Heritage site.  Aside from the stunning landscape, Halong Bay also offers various activities, such as kayaking, swimming, and exploring caves. I had the chance to visit some of the caves, which were full of unique stalactites and stalagmites, adding to the sense of adventure. The peaceful atmosphere, combined with the beauty of the bay, made it the perfect destination to relax and disconnect from the hustle and bustle of everyday life.  Overall, Halong Bay is a must-see destination for anyone visiting Vietnam. Its natural beauty, peaceful surroundings, and unique experiences make it an unforgettable part of any trip.

Ten out of ten. The scenery was great and the monkeys made a good kayak a great one. The views as you exit the stunning cave are great as you look out over crystal blue water. After a long day of heat though we had a relaxing swim and boarded the boat back to the city

I visited here a few years ago. I took one day trip package from the hotel service , and it was very nice. the tour picked me up from the hotel in a comfortable bus. it was almost a two hour trip from the hotel in the Old Quarter area to Halong Bay. Upon arrival I went to a large boat and then toured around the location for a few hours. On the boat, there was also delicious lunch provided. Really good experience and worth the money!

The highlight was actually just sitting on the top deck with our other tour members just watching the sun set and then seeing all the other tour boats ( and there were many) with their lights on in the dark.
Boat tours mostly come with lunch. Nice sights, excellent views, good food. Came here in 2015 and I still remember it fondly.

A trip to Ha Long Bay is an unforgettable experience and one of the highlights of visiting Vietnam. The bay’s stunning limestone karst formations rising from emerald-green waters create a truly breathtaking landscape. The cruise experience is well organized, with comfortable boats, friendly staff, and well-planned itineraries. Activities such as cave visits, kayaking, and island stops add variety and make the trip engaging rather than just scenic. Meals served on board are generally good, featuring fresh seafood and local Vietnamese dishes. The overall pace of the trip is relaxing and allows enough time to enjoy the views, take photographs, and unwind. Overall, a Ha Long Bay trip is a must-do for nature lovers and first-time visitors to Vietnam. It perfectly combines natural beauty, relaxation, and light adventure, making it a memorable travel experience.

Hạ Long Bay, located in Quảng Ninh province, Vietnam, is a stunning UNESCO World Heritage Site known for its emerald waters and thousands of towering limestone islands topped with rainforests. The bay covers an area of around 1,553 square kilometers and includes nearly 2,000 islets  Visitors often explore Hạ Long Bay through various cruises, ranging from budget to luxury options. These cruises offer activities like kayaking, cave visits, and beach stops, providing a unique way to experience the bay’s natural beauty

下龍灣，位於越南東北部廣寧省下的一片面積為1,553平方千尺的水域，包括1,960~2,000個小島，其中大部分是石灰岩島嶼。核心面積為334平方公里，擁有775個小島。下龍灣的石灰岩在不同的條件和環境下經歷了5億年的形成，在熱帶潮濕氣候的影響下，這個海灣的岩溶演化歷時2000萬年。1994年，下龍灣核心區聯合國列為世界遺產，也是越南廣寧省的必去的熱門旅遊地點

The journey from Hanoi to Ha Long Bay now takes approximately 2 hours as opposed to 4-5 hours in the past, hence, if you leave from Hanoi at 8-9, you can have a half day trip on a boat and be back in Hanoi by 6-7 the latest, depending on traffic. Ha Long Bay itself is majestic, albeit, slightly over crowded in recent years. One must experience it on its own. I recommend getting on a kayak and explore with a guide whilst try to avoid Ti Top Beach as its over crowded and has a very limited space to swim in. Boats also pass by so the water is not the clearest. Also, I would avoid going on rainy days as you wont see much of the spectacular surroundings.

Set in the Gulf of Tonkin, Ha Long Bay has some 1,600 islands and islets, and is famed for a spectacular seascape of limestone pillars. It is because of their precipitous nature, almost all the islands are unaffected and uninhabited by a human presence.  Situated around 164 km southeast of Hanoi, this 500 sq km area has around 3,000 rocky and earthen islands, which are typically in the form of jagged limestone pillars, popping out from the sea, along with numerous caves and grottoes, which blend together to display an extraordinary seascape.  This breathtakingly beautiful area was declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1994. The karst limestone pillars donning the bay makes it look like a place right out of a movie. And nevertheless, its surrealistic scenery has indeed served as the magical backdrop of various scenes in multiple films.

꼭 가야될것 하노이에서 투어로 해서 하루에 다녀옴  정말 힐링할수 있는 풍경은 최고  가능하면 sumset까지 포함 하는 투어 꼭 하시길
It's really beautiful place. But obviously it's very touristic. If you go there, better to check weather and keep nature clean.

1994年に世界遺産に登録されたベトナムの ハロン湾。1日ツアーに現地で申込んで参加しました。当日朝8時に各ホテルをツアーバスが巡って参加者をピックアップしてハノイを出発、高速道路経由で12時くらいに現地港から乗船していくつかの島を巡ってアクティビティをやり、21時くらいにハノイの各ホテル付近で降ろされる日程でした。乗船前にペットボトルは環境保全のために持って行けないと言われるので、船の中で飲み物を買う必要があります。船内では、昼飯と帰りの段階で軽食が屋上デッキで簡易パーティ的な感じで出ました。帰りの軽食はエビせん揚げとカットフルーツとクッキー程度なので、何かお菓子とかを持参した方が良いです。帰りお腹減りました。上陸する島では、階段を登ったり、洞窟に入ったりするのでスニーカーがお勧めです。ランチ提供タイミングの出航後10分くらいから絶景が始まるので、中座してデッキに出て景色を見る事をお勧めします！

There are no words to describe how beautiful Ha long bay is. A UNESCO World Heritage site. Emerald coloured waters and thousands of towering limestone islands covered with dense forest. I would recommend an overnight cruise trip here. This place is worth a visit.

Such a beautiful place. We went in June 2018 and had a great time here. We love the caves, the kayaking experiences ... to be able to wake up to such a beautiful sight every day is an amazing experience.  Let’s keep it clean while we enjoy the scenery.

近河內的下龍灣好地方！熟悉此景的大哥友人特意安排了四天三夜的灣遊，不同于其他團體的一日、二日遊，船上的8間客房全被我們包下！ 精心的安排越南餐點餐餐都舒服。第二天中午戶外灣洞穴的午餐特別喜歡。二張大桌子幸福的14人在下龍灣海上享受美食。 蝦、螃蟹、小卷、魷魚、海麗魚、石斑魚都是新鮮食材。簡單燙水加調味就好吃。牛豬鷄肉材越南人處理偏硬。早餐很豐盛，主廚還會煮鷄絲粥暖暖游子胃。 總體口味上跟台灣差不太多，沒有適應的問題。

Halong Bay in Vietnam is truly a wonder on earth, offering breathtaking landscapes and a unique experience that is hard to match. The bay is known for its emerald waters and thousands of towering limestone islands topped with rainforests. It's a UNESCO World Heritage site and a must-visit for nature lovers and adventure seekers alike.  I had an unforgettable experience exploring Halong Bay. The beauty of the place is mesmerizing, with its serene waters and majestic rock formations. The cruise through the bay was particularly delightful, offering panoramic views and a chance to visit stunning caves and floating villages. The sunsets and sunrises over the bay are spectacular, making for beautiful photo opportunities.  The nearest airport to Halong Bay is Cat Bi International Airport in Haiphong, which is about 60 km away. For those preferring train travel, the closest railway station is in Haiphong as well. There are also numerous bus services from Hanoi to Halong Bay, which take around 3-4 hours. Cruises are widely available and are the best way to explore the bay. They range from budget to luxury options, catering to different preferences and budgets.  Overall, Halong Bay offers a perfect blend of natural beauty and cultural experiences, making it a destination not to be missed.

È uno dei luoghi più belli del Vietnam. La Baia di Ha Long è indimenticabile: paesaggi incredibili, incantanti ci si perde tra il mare, i 2.000 e forse più isolotti e le numerose grotte carsiche che emergono nel Golfo di Tonchino. Noi abbiamo fatto una crociera (due giorni e una notte): da Hanoi sono circa 175 km. Nella baia si respira un senso di pace, in particolare nelle insenature che è possibile visitare solo con barche a remi. Su alcune rocce sono presenti scimmie e coltivazioni selvatiche. La luce e gli scenari da favola contraddistinguono questo luogo unico al mondo.
ハノイからの日帰りクルージングツアーで参加。ハロン湾の海にそそり立つ岩場を近くで見ると迫力がありますが、遠くから見たときの絶景や、夕暮れの景色も本当に綺麗で感動しました！！！行くなら絶対くクルージングをお勧めします。ハラン湾を色々な角度から楽しむ事ができて、本当に大満足でした。

Dramatic seascapes of towering limestone pillars jutting from emerald waters. Thousands of these karst formations create a mystical scenery, dotted with hidden grottoes, secluded beaches, and floating villages. Cruise options allow exploration of the bay's beauty, while kayaking and spelunking offer adventurous activities. Ha Long Bay is also steeped in local myths and legends, making it a destination rich in both natural wonder and cultural heritage.
クルーズツアーを事前に申し込んで参加しました。ハノイ、オペラハウス前集合で大型バスに乗り込み、３時間以上の移動でした。雨季にも関わらず晴天で抜群の景色でした。ただ、クルーズ船内がさすがに暑く、汗拭きウェットティッシュが必要でした。お料理メニューは、普通においかったです。鍾乳洞にもよりました。帰りは、途中お土産屋さんで休憩して、有名スポット、トレインストリートで降りました。

Magique, époustouflant, grandiose. Les paysages sont à couper le souffle et le voyage est réellement sublime. Vous êtes transportés et un déluge d’émotions vous submerge. Alors oui, avant de prendre une claque monumentale, il faut passer par des parcours balisés, chronométrés et mettre de côté le flot de touristes présents. Un conseil, privilégiez la visite en semaine (du monde quand même) plutôt que le week-end (5 fois plus de monde). La cerise sur le gâteau, rentrer au port lors du coucher du soleil et profiter une dernière fois de ces paysages hors du commun.

The cruise was well organized and very prompt. Vietnamese cuisine and local delicacies were served. Hot outside but the cruise has good air conditioning. The trip was very well planned and executed but I’m afraid the scenery, crystal clear water, beach and over all swimming experience is better in Coron, Philippines. One day trip is enough (and recommended) more than an over night cruise stay. Good for the whole family and such a memorable experience.
真的不愧是世界遺產，如同棋子一般的石灰岩地形錯落在海灣之中，搭配越南數十年的環境保護，呈現最原始的自然景觀，震撼且驚人，在遊船上邊吃buffet邊享受自然美景，落日餘暉灑在山丘，海面，心情不由自主的放鬆起來
在船上住一晚很值得 ，船屋本身都會有活動可以自由參加，也能詢問船屋是否有付費接駁車可搭乘，接駁車基本上能在河內老城區或還劍湖區到住宿酒店接客人，不過還是依船屋本身規定為準。船屋wifi不一定穩定，有自己的sim卡的網路會比較好。

Dua kali ke sini. Dan selalu pengen kembali lagi. Pemandangannya indah. Ambil paket wisata kapal pesiar 2 hari 1 malam. Cukup terjangkau. Makanan enak. Pengalaman memorable bersama istri dan anak-anak, terutama pas kegiatan naik perahu kayak. Kalo pas ada tiket promo lagi, cus agendakan ke sini.

Halongbay Vietnam, tur 1 day dengan perjalanan sejauh 190 Km ditempuh dalam waktu 2 jam 30 menit dengan 1 perhentian untuk ke restroom. Begitu sampai pelabuhan, langsung baik cruise dan makan siang. Menu yang oke adalah sate babi dan kerang yang dimasak sama cangkangnya. Udang fresh manis, sayang hanya diresbus, coba kalo ada saos pasang, pasti maknyus.  Pesan di klook, tadinya Alova Cruise, tapi pas H-1 diganti ke Wonderbay Cruise (di upgrade), dan ternyata memang sebagus itu kapal ataupun pulau batu yang junlahnya mencapai 2rb bahkan ada yang tanpa nama. Tur ini ada 3 kegiatan, TipTop, Halongbay, SungSot. Diberikan waktu untuk makan selama 45 menit, perjalan menuju ke TipTop 1 jam 20 menit. Bisa explore kapal dan bersantai di deck atas. Untuk cuaca berawan jadi tidak panas sama sekali.

Breathtaking magnificent scenery of limestone mountains rising from emerald water at Ha Long Bay, a Unesco World Heritage site. Hạ Long Bay has an area of around 1,553 km2 (600 sq mi), including 1,969 islets, most of which are limestone. Ha Long means descending dragon.

We got a local tour in Hanoi 2 days before. It was one day trip to Halong Bay. At first we feel a little bit worried they never pick us up at the hotel. It was late for 15 mins, they pick us at our lobby hotel. We straight off went to the harbour to get our boat. Met plenty of new friends from around the world on the boat. Feels like knew them from a long time ago. We had a yummy lunch fresh seafood on the boat. And cold beer. We went to the cave, to the hills, and get a kayaking. And finally got some photos on the sunset. Love it so much. Dont forget to put your Sun screen. It burned my skin damn good. 🤣
是參加兩天一夜郵輪的行程 風景蠻漂亮也蠻悠閒的 推薦
線上可以直接買，幾乎都是旅行社不是直接的船公司，個人覺得便宜的跟貴的差異應該不是很大。當然環境跟餐飲會有很大的差別推薦，如果可以划一定要去划獨木舟。是獨木舟都需要加價的行程 我當天從河內往返的話會有一點累.
美炸的地方 驚訝洞真的讓人很驚嘆 不喜歡爬樓梯的也給我爬上去！！ 真的不累的 四月初去氣溫22度在船上感覺偏涼 甚至同行反應有點冷 這季節去的可以帶件外套

This was one of the highlights of my visit to Vietnam. The bay is extraordinarily beautiful. As the day goes on and the angel of the sun changes, the light can make the scenery come alive. The caves, beaches and the climb to the peak all provide fantastic scenery.
世界遺産のハロン湾へ！  ラグジュアリークルーズ船でジャグジーに足を使って風を浴びながら 鍾乳洞に行きました✨ そこではカヌーをしたり、きつい階段を上りきり上からハロン湾を眺める素敵な経験が出来ます。 ランチはおしゃれなコースを堪能。  帰りの時も、スイーツやコーヒーのサービスもあり、ラグジュアリーなひと時を過ごして心が満たされました☺️💕  1人でも楽しめるアクティビティです！

Место красивейшее. Следует учитывать некоторые нюансы. Сезон - можно попасть в дожди и туманы. Мы второй раз здесь в конце августа - погода уже хорошая и гораздо меньше туристов.  Экскурсии в основном 5-6 часов или круиз на несколько дней (вы живете в бухте на корабле по соседству с кучей таких же кораблей, сам корабль стоит на якоре, передвижения по бухте на каяке или катере).  Экскурсии на 5-6 часов в одни и те же места (три остановки), разница только в цене, есть ли на лодке кондиционеры или лодка открытая. Напитки проносить запрещено. И вам предлагают все напитки покупать, конечно по завышенной цене. Как оказалось в стоимость тура входит только еда. И за воду придется везде платить.  Необходимо взять наличные деньги! Всё продают только за наличные. На первой остановке рекомендую взять каяк. Но если вы не можете грести - берите с собой зонт от солнца. Здесь зонты за оплату. Иначе можно получить тепловой удар! Лодки очень плотно набиты людьми, сиденья раскалены от солнца (на скамье лежит полотенце, впечатление что вы в сауне на горячих полках), двигается лодка медленно и вы абсолютно не получите удовольствия от видов.  Вторая остановка - пещера. Берите с собой воду! Если вы страдаете лишним весом, или пожилым людям - будет сложно. Очень жарко и надо подниматься в гору по лестнице. Но внутри пещеры прохладно и очень красиво.  Третья остановка пляж. Очень маленький и забит людьми. Вода конечно грязная в море. Но от жары все всё равно сидят в воде. Можно подняться на гору, если у вас ещё остались силы))  По итогу - я бы взяла только поездку в пещеру. Плыть через бухту, и все красоты вы увидите. Сама пещера великолепная и прохладная. Не надо сидеть в тесноте целый час на грязном крошечном пляже. Эту остановку я бы однозначно исключила из тура!  Рекомендую вечером сходить в парк, прокатиться на канатной дороге и на колесе обозрения!

世界遺産ハロン湾。 ハノイ市内から片道2時間半ほどでハロン湾ツアー必須です。湿気のないいい季節(2023.11.18)に行ったのは正解でした。ハロン湾の景色も良いのですが驚いたのは船の数。参加したツアーの詳細を書きます。(VELTRA$288のツアー) 道中現金しか使えないのでお気をつけください 【ハノイオペラハウス集合】 ・8:50出発のため8:40に到着するとしばらくしてガイドさんと合流できました 【休憩2回】 ・1回目は15分 ・2回目は30分(船に乗る前の最後のトイレ休憩) 【乗船】 ・食事開始(ツアーによる) ・食事はブッフェですが混み合いますし取らないと無くなります、あまり追加はない ・飲み物は全て現金のみ ・トイレの鍵が右に数回回して閉めるタイプのものなのでお気をつけください、紙は流せません 【手漕ぎボートまたはカヌー】 ・別料金にて高速ジェットボートがあります ・手漕ぎは船頭さんがいます、チップ忘れずに ・高速ジェットボートを選んだ人は一番先になります、その後にボートまたはカヌーできます 【ティートップ島】 ・滞在は45分ぐらいしかなかったです ・往復で25-30分でかなり急な階段を登っていきますので普段運動不足の方はかなりキツイと思います ・足元が悪いのでご年配やお子さんは難しく途中で引き返していました ・ただ上まで登る価値は十分あります、ここからしか見えない景色があります。 【鍾乳洞】 ・夏はサウナ状態のようですが11月中旬でしたので気温はちょうどよかったです ・上り下りがあるため足の悪い方は距離も長いためキツイと思います 【サンセット】 ・既に日が落ちてましたが空がオレンジ色に染まり綺麗でした ・船上で行われるティーパーティーの紅茶とワインは中々、味わえない質の悪さでこれもまた面白い体験ぐらいに考えると楽しめます 【補足】 カヌーからの景色は水面と近くなるのでオススメですがお尻が確実に濡れるので水着や着替えは必須です。着替える場所はありませんが外国籍の方は慣れてますね、既に洋服の下は水着できてました。 スマホを落としている方がいました。カヌーに乗る方は心配なら船内で販売しているホルダーを購入するとよいかと思います。
下龍灣位於越南東北部，面積廣達1553平方公里。  風景如山水畫般的美麗，屬於石灰岩喀斯特地形，有海上小桂林的美。  下龍灣這分佈1,969座石灰岩島嶼，每個島嶼都覆蓋著濃密的叢林植被。  1994年列入世界自然遺產。  這次和旅行團來此遊覽，在移動的Villa 船上待一天，非常的悠閒慢活。  一千多座石灰岩島嶼，每個都非常獨特。  有機會來越南旅遊，可安排這個景點，肯定會很有收穫。
Absolutely beautiful peaceful place. Many island good experience the go around. Recommend activity in ha long

Breathtaking experience. It was another level all together.  We stayed over night in the cruise. We boarded the ship, went to caves, been to ti top island.  We had cooking activity in the cruise night. Our cruise was surrounded by the other cruise and the view was breathtaking in the evening. Had all the facilities inside the cruise.  It might be very difficult for vegetarians to survive. Need to rely only on Bread Jam.

It's a must visit place that offers nothing but breathtaking views all around. Touristic yes, congested yes, but still the sights you get to see triumphs them all.  Best to explore using a cruise tour and staying overnight there (2 day or 3 day) to get the most out of it. But be sure to check the weather forcast as sometimes the tours would be canceled due to bad weather.  You can visit caves (could be crowded!) or do kayaking. There are also tours that do routes that are less congested but it will be costly.

One of the most stunning natural landscapes in the world! I grew up in British Columbia where thousands of treed and beachless islands jut up out of jagged coastline, but not like this. Nothing like this. Warm tropical air, lush jungles,  and the sound of monkeys and birds drifting across the serene waters all while surrounded by thousands of absolutely colossal Islets is like being transported to another time and place. I would HIGHLY recommend doing an overnight cruise to really take in the sunsets and sunrises in this magical place.
真的有時間可以在下龍灣來個3天2夜行，這樣基本每個行程都可以玩到.2天1夜勉強可以玩到一半以上的行程，基本上會有1.驚訝洞.2英雄島.3.半月湖.等等活動.分別有進洞 登頂 海灘 游泳 划船 夜釣等等…躺著耍廢也很爽.（缺點：海上超多垃圾…傻眼）

Comment: อ่าวหะล็องเวียดนาม: Vịnh Hạ Long, "อ่าวแห่งมังกรผู้ดำดิ่ง") เป็นอ่าวแห่งหนึ่งในพื้นที่ของอ่าวตังเกี๋ยทางตอนเหนือของประเทศเวียดนาม ใกล้ชายแดนติดต่อกับประเทศจีน มีพื้นที่ทั้งหมด 1,500 ตารางกิโลเมตร หรือ 937,500 ไร่ และมีชายฝั่งยาว 120 กิโลเมตร อยู่ห่างจากกรุงฮานอยไปทางตะวันออก 170 กิโลเมตร อ่าวหะล็อง ได้รับการขึ้นทะเบียนเป็นมรดกโลกในการประชุมคณะกรรมการมรดกโลกสมัยสามัญครั้งที่ 18 เมื่อวันที่ 17 ธันวาคม พ.ศ. 2537 ที่ภูเก็ต ประเทศไทย ในอ่าวหะล็องมีเกาะหินปูนจำนวน 1,969 เกาะโผล่พ้นขึ้นมาจากผิวทะเล บนยอดของแต่ละเกาะมีต้นไม้ขึ้นอยู่อย่างหนาแน่น หลายเกาะมีถ้ำขนาดใหญ่อยู่ภายใน ถ้ำที่ใหญ่ที่สุดในบริเวณอ่าวคือ ถ้ำเสาไม้ (Hang Đầu Gỗ, ฮางเดิ่วโก๋) หรือชื่อเดิมว่า "กร็อตเดแมร์แวย์" (Grotte des Merveilles) ซึ่งตั้งชื่อโดยนักท่องเที่ยวชาวฝรั่งเศสที่มาเยี่ยมชมอ่าวเมื่อปลายคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 19 ภายในถ้ำประกอบไปด้วยโพรงกว้าง 3 โพรง มีหินงอกและหินย้อยขนาดใหญ่อยู่จำนวนมาก เกาะที่มีขนาดใหญ่ที่สุดในบริเวณอ่าว 2 เกาะ คือ เกาะก๊าตบ่าและเกาะต่วนเจิว ทั้งสองเกาะนี้มีคนตั้งถิ่นฐานอยู่อย่างถาวร บนเกาะมีโรงแรมและชายหาดจำนวนมากคอยให้บริการนักท่องเที่ยว ส่วนเกาะขนาดเล็กอื่น ๆ บางเกาะก็มีชายหาดที่สวยงามที่นักท่องเที่ยวนิยมไปเยี่ยมชม บางเกาะเป็นที่ตั้งของหมู่บ้านชาวประมง และบางเกาะยังเป็นถิ่นอาศัยของสัตว์หลายชนิด เช่น ไก่ป่า ละมั่ง ลิง และกิ้งก่าหลายชนิด เกาะเหล่านี้มักจะได้รับการตั้งชื่อจากรูปร่างลักษณะที่แปลกตา เช่น เกาะช้าง (Hòn Voi, ห่อนวอย) เกาะไก่ชน (Hòn Gà Chọi, ห่อนก่าจ่อย) เกาะหลังคา (Hòn Mái Nhà, ห่อนม้ายหญ่า) เป็นต้น

Ha Long Bay natural heritage is one of the main attractions in Vietnam. Mesmerising and stunning views of ocean and mountains. Lots of cruise and boat tours available. Must visit destination. Recommended.

Will give it 5 star, its a must do tour in vietnam. We did an overnight cruise and it was totally worth it, we were provided awesome food and great hospitality. If you are a nature lover and love being around water, then you should definitely consider going there.
This is a must place to visit when in Vietnam. It will blow your mi d with its beauty and natural island scapes. I would go back there in a heartbeat.

ハノイからバスツアーで行きました。 朝8時に出て夜8時頃に戻ってきました。  行きのトイレ休憩のお土産物紹介では何も買いませんでした。  1回目のお散歩、洞窟の広さには感動しました。  船の上でオプションで、カヤックかボートか船の3種類の中から、人が漕いでくれるボートを選びました。  2回目のお散歩は、山を登るプチハイキング。 階段がハードなので高齢の方はキツイと思いますが、上がる方も多かったです。 登らないでビールで水着で休む方も多かったです。  船の中でのお昼ご飯は普通。  帰りに高速のサービスエリアでトイレ休憩があります。  帰りの10分のサービスエリアでパッと買い物出来ない人は、帰りのバス用に少しお菓子を持って行ってもいいかもしれません。

This was an awesome tour on a comfortable ship, with lunch and activities included. You have the option to choose between a kayak or a bamboo boat—both provide an unforgettable experience. It's a must-visit place!

奇岩絶壁という表現が適切かもしれません。ハノイからは2時間程度のバス移動で船着き場の街へ到着してから船でいくつかの島々を回る日帰りコースでした。天然の島だけで1000あまりの島々があるというので驚きです。中には海水浴も楽しめる島もあったり、鍾乳洞がある島もあったり観光するには飽きないほどさまざまな見所がある場所でした。訪ねた日が曇りで霧がかかっていたこともあり少しぼんやりとした風景になりましたが、晴れた日には遠くの島々も見える絶景だそうです。日本語のガイド付きだと英語ガイドに比べて2倍ほど高いので英語で少し聞き取りができるなら英語ガイド付きのコースを選んだ方がお得に楽しめます。あと船に乗ってからは飲み物がかなり割高なので乗る前に水などは用意しておくと良いと思います。
Gorgeous UNESCO site. Went on a 2D1N cruise but I think the activities can be covered within a day. Kayaking is definitely a must to enjoy the beautiful nature!

I booked a tour to go there , a tour lasting 6 hours with really good visit , starting from ha long bay cruise , I after been to the cave and having a kayak cruise we finally ended the tour with a meal , everything looking stunning , it s so pretty . And the tour guide was really kind and explain a lot about the place .it was such a good journey

A must visit if you are coming to Vietnam. I'd recommend a couple of days in Ha Long Bay, the city itself is nice and the boat tours you can do are well worth the money. I caught overcast and foggy weather and still really enjoyed myself. I Imagine the views are breathtaking when the sun is out.

자연경관이 수려한곳이에요 한폭의 산수화를 감상하는 느낌이에요 하노이 오면 이곳은 꼭 봐야한다고 생각해요  스피드보트, 카약, 밤부보트 3가지중 선택하여 섬을 둘러볼수있어요. 저는 밤부보트 이용했는데 ,뱃사공분이 사진도찍어주시고 옷도 젖지않아서 좋았어요. 마치고 팁1달러 드렸어요~ 대신 카약은 크기가작아서 밤부보트 사이에 끼거나 충돌하는것을 보고 위험해 보였어요.

We had an incredible day exploring the stunning Ha Long Bay on a cruise. The city looked like a bustling Las Vegas, but we were disappointed that we couldn't stay overnight. The caves we visited were full of adventure, and kayaking was an exhilarating experience. The view from the mountain top on Ti Top island was absolutely breathtaking, and even though the trek was challenging, it was completely worth it.

Man what should I say, must must visit the place and thoroughly enjoyed the bay. Lovely sunset to close the day, started the cruise at 12 pm along with alacady cruise service. Had lunch on the boat enjoyed hiking island, kayaking and woow time. Huh can't still get out of the fantastic experience I had 👍

Halong Bay is a must visit site when you are having your holiday at Vietnam, especially upon visiting the capital, Hanoi. There are a lot of one-day boat cruise tour or 2D1N boat cruise tour offered online or by local travel agencies. The boat cruise tour includes land transfer from Hanoi, meals, boat cruise as well as visiting three destinations like cave, beach, and kayaking. It is really a interesting place where you may enjoy the natural limestones, relaxing sea view as well as sumptous meals.
Go on a cruise. Very good experience. Do the kayaking. See the caves. Do a trek. All in one day. Worth every penny.
Lugar incrível. O cruzeiro de uma noite no Indochine Premium foi excelente. Boa infra, comida e staff atencioso, gentil e elegante. Amamos❤️❤️

Ha Long Bay is a collection of thousands of islands, and the undulating water reveals beautiful marble slabs, as if they are layered on top of each other to form magical lines.  Covering an area of ​​1,553 square kilometers of water, Halong Bay is a UNESCO World Heritage Site and a popular tourist destination in Vietnam.  Definitely recommend taking a cruise for three days and two nights.

It is a paradise on earth. When you go to Hanoi, take a tour to Ha long Bay where you explore the Pearls harvest then you take a boat cruise to enjoy Ha long Bay breathtaking view and sunset. You can also stop to visit the cave or enjoy the kayaking experience.
蓝天白云世界遗产～大自然最好的礼物，真的是值得一去的地方，船上的食物也不错吃～（买船票是要多询问，有一些乱开价）

Beautiful and must visit spot! Choose you’re cruise carrier carefully. The water in the bay aren’t very clean and clear as expected. And the ones who jumped in to swim ended up smelling bad. It’s a beautiful nature phenomenon that is a must go to in North Vietnam. Staying on a ship for the night was really special and made our wake-up moment in front of the mountains unforgettable

下龍灣面積1553平方公里，共有1969個島嶼，其中90%為石灰岩島嶼，海拔50至200米不等。經過複雜的地質構造運動以及長期強烈的石灰岩風化過程，大約5億多年才形成了這些形狀奇特的岩石島嶼；尤其是在約330多平方公里的 #海灣核心區域聚集著770個大小島嶼，於1994年聯合國教科文組織列為世界自然遺產名錄。並於2011年11月12日入選 #世界新七大自然奇觀。 下龍灣有許多古老的岩溶洞、海蝕洞遺跡，形成了世界上獨一無二壯麗的海蝕岩溶地貌。 我們包船遊覽下龍灣，導遊要我們發揮想像力，欣賞千奇百怪的島嶼和洞穴，我們看到了烏龜石、馬鞍石、鬥雞石、望夫石、人頭石等等，三分形象七分想像，透過想像力讓遊船過程更加豐富有趣。

À faire absolument quand on est au Vietnam Malheureusement beaucoup de pollution du au typhon et aux piscicultures sauvages qui ont laissé du polystyrène dans une bonne partie de la baie Quelques associations sont présentes pour nettoyer Sinon incontournable

The most memorable places to travel in Vietnam This is a place you should go once in a lifetime. Wonderful scenery is memorable.  This place is a UNESCO World Natural Heritage. There are about 3,000 large and small islands, It is the best for unexplored sightseeing.  Sarushima Island There are many rocks such as kiss rocks, dolphin rocks and camel rocks.  Ways to enjoy this place include boat cruises and small pleasure boats A good place to go sightseeing in any way.  베트남에서 가장 기억에 남는 여행지 평생 한 번 가야 할 곳입니다. 멋진 풍경은 기억에 남습니다.  이곳은 유네스코 세계 자연 유산입니다. 약 3,000 개의 크고 작은 섬이 있습니다. 비경 관광에 최적입니다.  원숭이 섬 키스 바위, 돌고래 바위 및 낙타 바위와 같은 많은 바위가 있습니다.  이 장소를 즐기는 방법으로는 보트 크루즈와 작은 유람선이 있습니다. 어떤 식 으로든 관광하기에 좋은 곳입니다.  ベトナム旅行の中で最も記憶に残る場所 一生にとって一度は行ってみるべき場所です。 すばらしい景色が記憶に残ります。  この場所はユネスコ世界自然遺産です。 約3,000の大小の島々があり、 秘境観光に最高です。  猿島 キス岩、イルカ岩、ラクダ岩など、様々な岩がたくさんあります。  この場所を楽しむ方法としては船上クルーズ、小さな遊覧船などあり どんな方法で観光をしても良い場所です。

Our trip to Halong Bay was truly spectacular. The natural beauty of the bay, with its towering limestone formations and peaceful emerald waters, left us in awe. We explored caves, went kayaking, and had the chance to see local fishing communities up close. The entire experience was well-organized and gave us a perfect balance of adventure and relaxation. Sailing through the bay, especially during sunset, was a memory we’ll never forget. Halong Bay is a must-visit for anyone traveling to Vietnam!

Booked a 3D2N cruise here through Klook. The usual for Ha Long Bay cruises are 2D1N, so do be prepared for a switch of tour guides on Day 2.  There is the luxurious option and quaint option. I went for the quaint version to have a local feel different from the usual large cruises we have in Singapore. A smaller cruise ship also meant more personalised service. The crew remembers you and takes really good care to provide good dining service. I felt the effort of the crew to make us feel at home and celebratory over Christmas when we were there. We had Vietnamese spring roll hands on class even :)  What you need to know: Drinks are all separately paid for so bring card and cash. They quote for those in USD but payment is in VND. Day 2 tour itinerary when I went was with a day cruise ship and the group consists of people from different cruise ships. I would say bring some snacks with you if you do not want to be hungry or pay overpriced snacks. Bring your swimwear even in winter season as you will still go for kayaking and swimming. There are 7 routes in Ha Long Bay. Most common route is route 1 where the ships hang around Ti Top Island. Every route is 1 day cruise. So 8D7N if you want to cover all 7 routes. There is transport around 2 hours from Hanoi Old Quarters area to the dock area so stay in this area if you want to be picked from your hotel instead of managing your way to the pick up point. Some people would say to pack a small carry on bag. I brought my 28” luggage and it was all good to bring on board + open in the room. Though this does depend on the cruise ship you’re booked on.

2024年5/4に訪問。ハロン湾、天気予報は怪しかったけれど、結局は晴れて素晴らしい景色を楽しめました！ 6時間のラグジュアリークルーズを事前に申し込んだのですが、こちらには、鍾乳洞の訪問、ボート、プーケット島の訪問が含まれていました。 鍾乳洞は日本にはなかなかないスケールの大きさで、見応えが抜群でした！中はすっごい暑かったですけどね。 ボートも景色がよく、プーケット島の頂上からのハロン湾の景色も最高でした！ 暑い中結構歩くので、だいぶ体力を使います、体調整えていくといいです！  波は少ない地域なので酔っている人はほとんどいないようでした！

Une des Sept Merveilles du monde. Notre conseil est de réserver une excursion et passer minimum une nuit sur la Baie. Le lieu est incroyable avec des magnifiques et unique au monde. Nous avons pris le bateau mon chéri 2 qui est plutôt agréable.
Wunderschöner Ausflug mit dem Boot mit bestem Essen.  Der Fisch wurde direkt frisch gefangen  auf Boot geliefert und zubereitet.  Super!!
استمتعنا كثير في هذا الخليج عملنا هايك 2 كيلو داخل كهف جميل بالجزيره وبعدها رحنا تجديف 🚣 وبعدها رحنا هايك بالدرج 500 متر مع سباحه

Een van de mooiste wereldwonderen. Toen wij hier waren, was er onweer en zaten we midden tussen deze grote rotsen in het water. Hebben zelfs inktvis midden in de nacht mogen vissen en opeten. Dit was echt een onvergetelijk avontuur.
One of the highlights of our Vietnam trip. A two-three days cruise on the bay would be a good decision.

下龍灣，這個世界十大自然景觀，當你真的坐船經過這一大片，一座又一座，有著各式各樣自然姿態的小島時，你會感受到造物者的力量，這個是人的力量所不能及。登上小島之後，島上的鐘乳石洞更是別有洞天，巧奪天工，聽導遊說是島嶼以前沈在海中被海水沖蝕而成。大多數的遊客會選擇在船上過夜，即便是只有一個客房的游船也都附有廁所及淋浴間。船上不過夜也會包含一次餐點，導遊並會帶你登島參觀，其中可能包括參觀鐘乳石洞，跟划雙人獨木舟。從河內市中心到下龍灣的行車時間約為兩個半小時

Very beautiful indeed to cruise round we took far too many photos. We didn't know but we visited during low season so none of the beach bars, cafes toilets or showers were open!  At night there were two extremely load beach bars open with hige light shows but not a thing during the day!? There are many many many hotels in the area which appreard to catter just to Chinese Japanese and Korean tourists. I think that maybe the businesses there are really missing a trick and should open for the many western people we saw roaming about looking for toilets drinks snacks and sun loungers and giving up and going back to their hotels.

Beautiful, but make sure you get a good company for the tour as that makes a difference. You can do the tour from several places. We chose Cat Ba and it is not very busy so it was nice as we saw the south of Ha Long and Lon Ha Bay.

wow very beautiful place to visit. Also have many places to photography.  I was travel this place. Very nice experience. Amazing, fantastic view points. Wonderfull creation of nature. 👍  There is beauty everywhere. Place to feel the beauty of Vietnam. ❤️😍  I recommended going to ha long bay, vietnam.  Also hope come to back.  I love to Vietnam and Vietnam peoples. ❤️

If your thinking of going here then think no more, this is a great place for a 3 day cruise. Very quiet, the scenery is second to none. Plenty of boat companies to choose from. I would recommend Bhaya Cruise Company, we used these and their service is second to none, staff are very well informed and helpful.  All I would say is there is a bit of rubbish floating in the sea, so if you go please ask the locals to keep it clean. Also put your own rubbish in the bin, don't ruin this place.

Such a beautiful and stunning place. When we went there it was wet and raining, however that didn’t take away how amazing it was. Drifting in between the rock formations is an experience and a definite to-do if visiting Vietnam.
* 世界遺産のハロン湾をクルージングできます。地球の偉大さを感じる素晴らしい場所です。 ハノイからバスで片道4時間の距離にあります。バス往復代、ランチ代、クルージング代、トレッキングやカヌーといったアクティビティを含めて5000円くらいです。 ぜひ一度行ってみて下さい。

Vịnh Hạ Long, located in Quang Ninh, Vietnam, is a stunning coastal destination known for its thousands of limestone islands rising from the emerald waters. It offers visitors the chance to explore its mystical seascape through boat tours, outdoor activities like hiking and kayaking, and the opportunity to savor delicious seafood. This UNESCO World Heritage site is not only a natural wonder but also a cultural experience with local festivals and traditional fishing villages adding to its charm.
世界遺産、ベトナム屈指の景観美。ハロン湾を楽しむには、日帰りとクルーズ船に宿泊する2種類があるようですが、世界自然遺産のなかで夜を明かすといった特別な時間を過ごすクルーズ船の宿泊が絶対おすすめです。

The scene doesn't say anything but the service is too bad compared to Trang An and other places. The boat driver coaxing customers to buy products and take photos made me very uncomfortable, not to mention that when I got there, he turned on the mode to ask for a tip. Bo is a tourist who voluntarily gives as thanks, not under the obligation to give, causing loss of sympathy for tourists. The Management Board needs to reconsider this. Tourists have spent money on tickets that include everything, and the tickets are not cheap. I went once and was asked for it and it was very uncomfortable, I won't go back again

because everyone recommended the boat tour, we did it. it is quite an expensive tour for vietnam for the time of 1 hour. it started with many boats approaching us and wanting to take pictures of us for 1 dollar. although we refused, we were harassed further. the trip through the short caves was nice. at some point the boat driver unpacked pictures and wanted to sell them to us for twice as much as we saw in the souvenir stores. we politely declined and she hassled us and got angry. during almost the entire tour, the boat driver spoke very loudly on the phone. on the way back she said several times that we had to tip her afterwards. that was the only english word she knew. all in all it was a tiring and disappointing trip. i would recommend doing the boat trip in trang an. the scenery is nicer there too.

What a scummy bunch of scammers.We took this boat tour through the river and three caves. Before turning back after the third cave, our ‘driver’ stopped beside a woman on another rowing boat selling drinks and snacks. Following this, she forced us to try and buy drinks and snacks putting them on our laps, the young woman I stated we buy these refreshments for ‘our poor tired driver who’s taken us 70km’.She chose two loads of mangos and drinks which I knew this tiny little lady won’t have all of it. To this, I only had 100 VD in cash, so I said I have no more money. Me being kind, I said “no worries the driver can have the refreshments I’ll pay for her”. This young woman took back our cans of coke which we needed in 40 degree heat but let the ‘poor little lady’ driver keep her refreshments..Low and behold as I turned around she had given these refreshments back to the seller behind our backs!This beautiful scenic tour ending in a scam. These people have zero respect for others and see tourist like scum. It feels rather hypocritical how they preach peace and love and respect for their religion yet behave like this towards others. I hope Karma comes back to get them. Apart from the beauty of this county, there is no way I’d ever want to visit this country again. Because of the amounts of scams that happen, they take advantage of tourists. The ‘little old lady’ had a check to still ask for a tip. To which I said NO we paid for your lunch and I clearly said you’ve given it back I gestured to her so she understood what I was saying. From the beginning she said she spoke a little English.. funnily enough she forgot a single word once I told her how awful they were. The other scams on this tour are the pictures they try and sell you. They take quite a few and then say there’s better ones upping the price. They sell different junk in boxes too along the way and give them to the other drivers on the return. Say NO NO NO if you do this tour. * I’ve been told that the money from the refreshments scam gets split between driver and seller. What a bunch of immoral crooks.One of the scammers in this photo.
Very agressive people asking tips all the tour. You ll be asked to pay extra from the beginning till the end.  Be also aware the fee for the boat is double than announced on the panel.

De boottocht begon leuk. Leuke schipper, maar naarmate de toch vorderde sloeg dit helemaal om. Aan het einde van de tocht, daar waar je omkeert om terug te varen, vroegen vrouwen eten/drinken van hen te kopen, toen ik zei dat ik dat niet wilde, werd ik gedwongen eten en drinken voor de schipper te kopen. Gedaan, maar vervolgens een zeer onprettige situatie gehad op die boot. Vervolgens bij terugkomst in het haventje, werd ik gedwongen door de schipper hem een tip te geven. Zeer onprettige ervaring!
Boring with pushy locals trying to sell you crap.It's so worth going 10kms further and an extra 100,000vnd to Trang An boat tours which is fantastic.

Upon arrival to the check in, we were schooled at the stark difference in the written price that was scribbled on a piece of paper, verses the billboard advertisement that was 10 feet to the side of it. With a price paid of $390,000 Dong, this is an expensive activity by itself in Vietnam. We got in the boat, and off we went with a quiet lady who began rowing with her feet. This was way cool! She began hollering in Vietnamese at the passing boats, which we took as small talk at first, with normal scoffing and bickering to passing boats and even locals on land. Our boat driver stopped the boat in the middle of the tour to get some mangoes from another boat driver. Interesting we thought. After paddling a long time with her feet, going through some amazing sights, we also saw a lot of littering and disappointment. After going under several wonderful caves, we came to a halt with no explanation. A con boat came up and tried making us purchase food and drink for the tired boat driver. The price started at $150,000 Dong and went down to $80,000 Dong for some mangos and a soda that the lady con artist wanted us to pay for, for the boat driver. When we refused, the con boat paddled away, but the boat driver refused to paddle - we were stranded and she said “ too tired” implying she was too tired to paddle away. After some time and puzzled waiting, she began paddling back. When coming up to the dock, she stopped again and demanded a tip. We tipped $100,000 Dong but she looked at it and requested double, $200,000 Dong. We refused to pay and finally she towed ashore.Never again! Friendly advice. Save your money and go to Tra Ang boat tour it is 200 percent better in every way.

We did the boats tour. The whole experience was super disappointing. 1) it is insanely expensive (we paid 18$ for the two of us)2) unfriendly people driving the boat: our guide tried to sell us some pictures and, different to the city, you can not walk away if you are on a boat on a 2 h trip3) after harassing us, the tour guide asked us for a tip. Since we felt very bad throughout the trip, we did not pay it and were scolded put4) 2h boats trip is just super boring. There are a lot of tourists on their phones, understandably.5) in the middle if the tour, there are other merchants who pressure you to buy something. Our tour guide even drove us to the merchants and did not turn away, although we told her we were not interested6) boring caves: the caves were not worth a visitThis is one more attraction where you as a tourist are just seen as walking money.  Overall, we saw an inverse correlation between entry prices and services offered. The more expensive, the shittier it is. Frustrated because od the experience, my bf and I decided to do a trip through Ninh Binh on our own and not engage in any touristy activity. We found a temple which was free of entry and was the nicest temple you will see in Vietnam! They are Chua Ky Lan and Thap Chua Bac.Please save your money and time and skip this!

The płace is really beautiful but the local people destroy all the charm of the area. They are rude and they force you to give them money. The locals treated us as the walking wallets. At the end of the kayak trip they insisted on buying things and at the end the rower repeated obsessively <tip, tip, give me tip!!!>, we were shocked. We gave him 10K even though I didnt want to give him anything because of his rude behaviour. He took the money and he was very nervous that we didnt give him more.During the kayak trip the women on the other kayaks proposed obsessively to do us some photos - of course to pay for it. They do not understand the word <no>.I’ve never met the ruder local people. Rude, insisting and making the trip annoying.

We already paid a lot of admission for the conditions in Vietnam. On the water several ladies on boats met us, where we were to buy food for our boatwoman for 100,000 VND. Like many other boaters, our wife is also deliberately headed for such a kiosk boat, so we couldn't get around negotiating with the kiosk woman. When we refused the overpriced food and decided to give our wife 50,000 VND in cash so that she has more of it, she accepted it ungratefully and wanted another 50,000 VND so that she ended up earning another 100,000 VND through us. So we had to pay not only the overpriced entrance fee, but also 100,000 VND just for our boatwoman as a tip.

Mijn vrouw en ik zijn een reis van 7 weken aan het maken door het mooie Vietnam. Ook hebben we het plaatsje Tam Coc aangedaan, maar dit viel vies tegen! De natuur is er mooi, maar is in verhouding tot andere plekken als Phong Nha N.P. niet heel speciaal. Wat vooral opvalt is de negatieve/ rare houding van de lokale mensen tegenover toeristen. Ze zien toeristen puur en alleen als een bron van inkomsten waar ze zoveel mogelijk geld van moeten ontfutselen in zo'n kort mogelijke tijd. De vriendelijke houding voelt daardoor fake en je hebt continu het gevoel dat je opgelicht wordt. Met de scooter hebben we de omgeving doorgecrosst en aardig wat plekken aangedaan, maar de "nare ervaringen" stapelden elkaar op waar we ook waren. Het begon met de boot tour in Tam Coc village.
